content_structure.text: You see, ADHD is not the inability to focus. It is an inability to suppress internal and external noises.
That's where the anxiety, stress and self-esteem might come. It might feel that life is out of control and daily tasks seem impossibly huge.

It works by first discovering your 'ADHD type' and then putting the system in place and letting the changes unfold naturally.
It's crazy how easily it works...
